2606.04517.title: Treat Traffic Like Trees: A Semantic-Preserving Hierarchical Graph-Based Expert Framework for Encrypted Traffic Analysis
2606.04517.paper_summary: Graph-based deep learning methods have been widely employed in encrypted traffic analysis to exploit latent correlations across different granularities. However, while complex preprocessing pipelines and sophisticated model structures often achieve strong performance, they may obscure inherent protocol semantics during representation learning. Moreover, the hierarchical structure of protocol layers and their corresponding fields, defined by protocol specifications and routinely utilized in manual traffic analysis, remains underexplored in existing learning frameworks. In this paper, we propose Protocol Tree Graph Attention with Mixture of Experts (PTGAMoE), a semantic-preserving hierarchical graph-based expert framework for encrypted traffic analysis. The field-based graph construction and expert committee design enable PTGAMoE to quantify the model's preferences for specific fields and protocols. Extensive experimental results on representative benchmark datasets under strict no-data-leakage settings demonstrate that PTGAMoE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) models. Furthermore, the semantic-preserving design provides interpretable insights into protocol-level feature importance and expert-level contributions, reflecting the model's decision-making logic in encrypted traffic classification tasks.
2606.04517.paper_summary_zh: 圖基深度學習方法已廣泛應用於加密流量分析，以利用不同粒度之間的潛在相關性。<lb/>然而，雖然複雜的預處理管道和精密的模型結構通常能達到強大的性能，但它們在表示學習過程中可能會掩蓋固有的協議語義。<lb/>此外，由協議規範定義的協議層次的層級結構及其相應的字段，在手動流量分析中經常使用，卻在現有的學習框架中尚未得到充分探索。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了帶有專家混合的協議樹圖注意力（PTGAMoE），這是一種保留語義的層級圖基專家框架，用於加密流量分析。<lb/>基於字段的圖構建和專家委員會設計使PTGAMoE能夠量化模型對特定字段和協議的偏好。<lb/>在嚴格的無數據泄漏設置下，對代表性基準數據集的廣泛實驗結果表明，PTGAMoE顯著超越了最先進（SOTA）模型。<lb/>此外，保留語義的設計提供了對協議層級特徵重要性和專家層級貢獻的可解釋見解，反映了模型在加密流量分類任務中的決策邏輯。
2606.04517.author: Yuantu Luo et.al.
2606.04517.authors: Yuantu Luo, Jun Tao, Linxiao Yu, Guang Cheng
